product_overview: Ecosera is a mobile-first Progressive Web App (PWA) that provides a simple, low-friction hyperlocal catalog connecting rural buyers to local sellers. Buyers browse and order items via WhatsApp while a secured admin portal manages sellers, products, and lightweight analytics.
core_goals: Provide a simple, highly readable mobile-first catalog for low-digital-literacy users.
Enable frictionless ordering by redirecting buyers to WhatsApp with a pre-filled message (no buyer accounts or in-app payments).
Allow a single admin (founder) to manage sellers, products, banners, and marketing content securely.
Track minimal analytics (searches, product views, WhatsApp clicks) to power an admin dashboard.
Deliver an MVP PWA that performs well on low-end mobile devices.

features.name: Home Page (Landing)
features.description: Mobile-first landing page with hero banners, minimal categories, regional highlights (Pilihan Daerah), trending/featured products and starter bundles to help buyers discover items quickly.
user_flows: GET /api/banners -> 200 list of banners -> GET /api/categories -> 200 list of categories -> GET /api/pilihan-daerah -> 200 regional highlights -> GET /api/featured?limit=10 -> 200 featured products
GET /api/banners -> 500 server error -> Load cached banners from localStorage (client fallback) -> Log fallback via POST /api/events with {type:'client_fallback', reference_id:'banners'} -> 201

features.name: Product Browsing (Etalase) & Search
features.description: Browse products by category or search by keyword; view product cards with price, image, and seller summary.
user_flows: GET /api/products?category=beras&page=1 -> 200 paged product list -> GET /api/shops/:seller_id -> 200 seller summary
GET /api/search?q=beras -> 200 search results -> POST /api/events with {type:'search', reference_id:'beras'} -> 201

GET /api/search?q=beras -> 500 server error -> Show 'Try again' UI and do not block browsing -> POST /api/events with {type:'search', reference_id:'beras'} -> 500 (analytics log failed) -> Continue without analytics

features.name: Product Detail & WhatsApp Order
features.description: Show clear product photos, description, price, and a prominent "Order via WhatsApp" CTA that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message while logging events for analytics.
user_flows: GET /api/products/:slug -> 200 product detail -> POST /api/events with {type:'view', reference_id:'product_id'} -> 201

GET /api/products/:slug -> 200 product detail -> POST /api/events with {type:'whatsapp_click', reference_id:'product_id'} -> 201 -> Redirect client to https://wa.me/{seller_number}?text={pre_filled_message}
GET /api/products/:slug -> 404 -> Show 'Product not found' UI -> POST /api/events with {type:'view_failed', reference_id:'slug'} -> 201
POST /api/events with {type:'whatsapp_click', reference_id:'product_id'} -> 500 -> Proceed with redirect to WhatsApp anyway (do not block user)

features.name: Seller Shop Page
features.description: Dedicated page for a seller showing seller information and that seller's product listings to facilitate buyer trust and focused browsing.
user_flows: GET /api/shops/:seller_id -> 200 shop info -> GET /api/shops/:seller_id/products -> 200 product list
GET /api/shops/:seller_id -> 404 -> Show 'Seller not found' message and suggest home search -> POST /api/events with {type:'shop_view_failed', reference_id:'seller_id'} -> 201

features.name: Cart (Client-side, optional v1.1)
features.description: Client-only cart used as a saved-items list (no backend persistence, single-item ordering still expected). Implemented with local storage/IndexedDB as a soft-saved list.
user_flows: IndexedDB: add record {product_id, quantity} -> success -> IndexedDB: get all cart items -> returns list
IndexedDB: add record {product_id, quantity} -> write error/quota exceeded -> Show 'Unable to save item' UI and fallback to in-memory list

features.name: Wishlist (Client-side)
features.description: Allow buyers to save products for later via a wishlist stored in client state (localStorage/IndexedDB).
user_flows: localStorage: set wishlist add {product_id} -> success -> localStorage: get wishlist -> returns items
localStorage: set wishlist add {product_id} -> quota exceeded/write error -> Show 'Unable to save to wishlist' message

features.name: E-Learning (Educational Modules)
features.description: List sustainability education modules and provide module detail views for community learning.
user_flows: GET /api/e-learning -> 200 list of modules -> GET /api/e-learning/:moduleId -> 200 module detail
GET /api/e-learning -> 500 -> Show offline/fallback content and log error via POST /api/events with {type:'e_learning_fetch_failed'} -> 201

features.name: Admin Authentication (Admin Login)
features.description: Secure login for the founder to access the private admin portal (Supabase-backed authentication).
user_flows: POST /api/admin/login with {email,password} -> 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/admin/me with Authorization: Bearer token -> 200 admin profile
POST /api/admin/login with invalid credentials -> 401 Unauthorized -> Display 'Invalid credentials' and do not redirect

features.name: Admin Dashboard (Analytics)
features.description: Admin overview displaying top-clicked products, most viewed products, top search keywords, and top-performing sellers using lightweight analytics traced from frontend events.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/dashboard/metrics with Authorization: Bearer token -> 200 metrics payload (top_clicks, top_views, top_searches) -> Render dashboard
GET /api/admin/dashboard/metrics with expired token -> 401 Unauthorized -> Redirect to /admin/login

features.name: Admin Shop Management (CRUD)
features.description: Create, edit, and list seller profiles (name, WhatsApp number, description) used to populate the public catalog.
user_flows: POST /api/admin/shops with Authorization: Bearer token and {name, whatsapp_number, description} -> 201 created with seller_id -> GET /api/admin/shops with token -> 200 updated list
POST /api/admin/shops with missing required fields -> 422 validation error -> Show validation messages

features.name: Admin Product Management (CRUD + Image Upload & Cropping)
features.description: Create, edit, and list products for a shop; support image upload (with client-side cropping) and saving uploaded image URLs to product records.
user_flows: POST /api/admin/uploads with Authorization: Bearer token and image file -> 201 {image_url} -> POST /api/admin/shops/:seller_id/products with Authorization: Bearer token and {name,price,category_id,image_url} -> 201 created -> GET /api/admin/shops/:seller_id/products with token -> 200 list
POST /api/admin/uploads with oversized file -> 413 Payload Too Large -> Show 'Image too large' and abort product creation

features.name: Admin Marketing Management (Banners & Promotions)
features.description: Manage marketing banners and promotional content shown on the home/landing pages.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/marketing with Authorization: Bearer token -> 200 marketing list -> POST /api/admin/marketing with token and {title,image_url,link} -> 201 created
POST /api/admin/marketing with invalid image_url -> 422 validation error -> Display validation error to admin

features.name: Admin Trending Management
features.description: Maintain the curated list of trending items displayed on the public site.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/trending with Authorization: Bearer token -> 200 trending list -> PUT /api/admin/trending with token and updated ordering -> 200 updated
PUT /api/admin/trending with Authorization: Bearer token but insufficient permissions -> 403 Forbidden -> Show permission error

features.name: Home Page
features.description: Landing page with hero banners, product categories, regional product highlights (Pilihan Daerah), trending products, starter bundles, and sought-after items

features.name: Product Browsing
features.description: Users can browse products by category via the Etalase page, search for products, and view product details with images, descriptions, pricing, and seller information

features.name: Cart
features.description: Shopping cart functionality allowing users to add, remove, and manage products in their cart with quantity controls

features.name: Wishlist
features.description: Users can save products to their wishlist for later viewing

features.name: Seller Shop
features.description: Dedicated seller profile page showing seller information and their product listings

features.name: E-Learning
features.description: Educational content module with learning modules and module detail views for sustainability education

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Admin login functionality with protected routes using Supabase authentication

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin overview dashboard with key metrics and management summaries

features.name: Admin Shop Management
features.description: CRUD operations for managing seller shops including creating, editing, and listing shops

features.name: Admin Product Management
features.description: CRUD operations for managing products per shop including creating, editing, and listing products with image upload and cropping

features.name: Admin Marketing Management
features.description: CRUD operations for managing marketing banners and promotional content

features.name: Admin Trending Management
features.description: Management of trending product configurations

features.name: Navigation and Layout
features.description: App shell with header, bottom navbar, scroll-to-top functionality, and responsive layout
